context: A landmark year for Canadian pop, with Montreal's Corey Hart claiming the number-one year-end spot with 'Never Surrender' -- the first Canadian artist to top the RPM year-end chart since 1974. Toronto's Platinum Blonde also broke into the top 5 with 'Crying Over You,' featuring a guitar cameo by Rush's Alex Lifeson.

tracks.title: I Want to Know What Love Is
